remarks: Wonderful opportunity to own a light-filled end unit. Ranch-style one-bedroom condo in the sought-after Fillow Ridge community of West Norwalk. This private end unit features a cozy fireplace, dining area and eat kitchen with access to outdoor space with private deck perfect for relaxing or entertaining. The spacious bedroom is big enough for a king sized set with bathroom close by for easy access. Additional highlights include in-unit washer and dryer, parking conveniently outside the unit, and generous closet space. Low common charges in a well-maintained complex, just minutes to Metro-North, the Merritt Parkway, Norwalk Hospital, shopping, and dining. A perfect blend of comfort, convenience, and value - schedule your showing today.
